prediction.chief_complaint: right heel pain for six weeks, worse with first steps
plan: calf and plantar fascia stretching exercises
supportive shoes, no walking barefoot at home
naproxen 220 mg twice a day with food for 10 days
consider night splint if mornings stay rough
return in 8 weeks if no progress for PT referral or steroid injection

follow_up.reason: return in 8 weeks if no progress
